paper.title: daf-2 allele evidence fixture paper
paper.conversation_summary: Extract evidence-backed allele findings from a known paper fixture.

chunks.text: Figure 3B. daf-2(m41) animals formed dauer larvae at 25 C.
Sequencing identified a glycine-to-glutamate substitution in daf-2(m41), confirming the allele lesion.
The daf-2(e1368) strain was maintained as described previously and crossed into the reporter background.
